response.justification: Szabo exceeds the 15-year experience requirement (20 years) with strong technical credentials from MIT and current work in AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. However, he lacks the established AI/ML expertise and cloud platform strategy background the role seeks. His AI infrastructure work is recent (14 months), and there is no evidence of the enterprise customer advisory experience or recognized AI products/platforms required for a director-level strategy position.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering experience exceeding minimum requirement, with staff-level roles demonstrating technical leadership
MIT computer science degree with proven ability to build complex platforms across multiple domains (GIS, direct mail, investment tech)
Current involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, positioning him in the AI space
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI/ML; AI expertise is recent (April 2025) rather than the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated products' the role requires
Cloud platform strategy experience not evident; AWS CDK mentioned once but cloud/AI strategy is not a demonstrated primary focus area
No demonstrated advisory experience with strategic customers or partners; workshops and talks show knowledge-sharing but not enterprise-level advisory track record

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
